outline.title: New Testament Survey
outline.summary: Welcome to the New Testament Survey course. This in-depth survey explores the Gospels, Acts, Paul's epistles, and the general epistles, revealing the life, teachings, and redemptive work of Jesus Christ and the birth of the Christian church.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: This course provides comprehensive coverage of the New Testament, including the four Gospels, the Acts of the Apostles, Paul's letters, and the epistles of James, Peter, John, and Jude. You will explore the historical context, theological themes, and practical applications of New Testament teachings.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: The course consists of 10 comprehensive lessons organized by major sections of the New Testament. Each lesson includes video content, reading materials, and interactive quizzes to reinforce your learning and deepen your understanding of Christ and the early church.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Learning Objectives
outline.summary: By the end of this course, you will understand the life and teachings of Jesus, trace the development of the early church, interpret New Testament texts in their historical context, and apply New Testament principles to contemporary Christian faith and practice.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Begin Your Journey
outline.summary: Dedicate time each week to engage with the material, reflect on the biblical principles, and apply them to your spiritual life. Upon completion, you will receive a CPD-accredited certificate recognizing your theological achievement.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
